channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Surfshark Promo Codes: 87% Off | March 2026
item.description: Save up to 87% with a Surfshark coupon code, 3 months of VPN free today, and more from WIRED.

item.title: Layla Sleep Coupon: Save Up to $600 in March 2026
item.description: Upgrade your sleep setup with the latest Layla promo codes. Save on flippable mattresses, copper-infused pillows, and adjustable bases during the Spring Sale.

item.title: 50% Off DoorDash Promo Code | March 2026
item.description: Explore today’s top DoorDash promo codes for $25 off your first order, free delivery, and up to 50% off for existing customers.

item.title: How to watch Japanese Grand Prix 2026 F1: Live Stream, Preview, Schedule
item.description: All the ways to watch Japanese Grand Prix 2026 live streams online and from anywhere, as teams face Suzuka's fast corners and tricky energy management.

item.title: Forget 2Gbps NBN — NBN Co’s latest full-fibre speed trial proves the network can go much, much faster
item.description: It's taken years to get multi-gigabit internet in Australia, but now they're already achieving over 200 gigabits per second!

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for March 27, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.

item.title: Moon phase today: What the Moon will look like on March 27
item.description: See the Moon phase expected for March 27, 2026 as well as when the next Full Moon is expected.

item.title: Google's AI-powered conversational Search Live tool is going global — with real-time answers now available in more languages
item.description: After an initial rollout in the US, Google’s Search Live is now rolling out to 200 other countries, providing conversational search in 98 languages.
